JUDGE HARKJOON PAIK, DPADILLA, REPORTER, GGOROSIN, CLERK JURY TRIAL CONT'D FROM 5/27/97. PLTF. PRESENT WITH COUNSEL, JULIAN LASTOWSKI, CHRISTINA BRINLEY APPEARING FOR DEFT WHO IS NOT PRESENT. PLTF. REST. DEFT DID NOT PUT HER CASE. CLOSING ARGUMENTS. COURT INSTRUCTS JURY ON THE LAW OF THE CASE. BAILIFF, OLSEN, SWORN TO TAKE CHARGE OF THE JURY. JURY RETIRED TO THE JURY ROOM TO DELIBERATE ON ITS VERDICTS. JURY RETURNED TO COURT WITH A VERDICT. JURY FINDS A VERDICT IN FAVOR OF PLTF. & AGAINST DEFT FOR $11,000. JURY VERDICT READ INTO THE RECORD. JURY POLLED, VERDICT UNANIMOUS. EXHIBITS RETURNED TO BOTH COUNSEL BY STIP. PLTF. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.
